problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to they, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
